common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.notFoundHint: Check the link or ask the host for a fresh one.

landing.heroSub: Every guest shoots on their own in-browser camera. The photos stay hidden until morning, then open in one shared gallery.
landing.heroAlt: A bride and groom walking through golden evening light
landing.betasharBody: At a Kazakh wedding, the bride's face is veiled so it can be unveiled at the most important moment. Kormem treats the photos of your night the same way: they sleep under a veil, and in the morning they open to everyone at once.
landing.betasharPun: In Kazakh, korme means both "exhibition" and "don't look".
landing.betasharAlt: Betashar ceremony: the bride hidden behind a white veil
landing.step1Text: A date, a name and a shot count. The QR code for the tables is ready in a minute.
landing.step2Text: The camera opens from a link, right in the browser. No apps, no accounts.
landing.step3Text: At the hour you set, every photo appears for everyone at once: the whole night through every guest's eyes.
landing.stylesTitle: Six film stocks to choose from
landing.stylesSub: The style shows in the viewfinder before the shot. The original is always stored clean.
landing.stylesPhotoAlt: A groom lifting his bride against the sunset
landing.revealTitle: The night keeps. The morning shows.
landing.revealSub: Before the reveal, nobody sees a single frame: not the guests, not even us.
landing.planFreeText: All film styles, the shared gallery, the reveal and printable QR cards — no subscriptions, no fees.
landing.faq1q: Do guests need to install an app?
landing.faq1a: No. The camera opens right in the browser from a link or QR code. Works on iPhone and Android, including budget models.
landing.faq2a: Whenever you decide: instantly, at the end of the night, or at your own time, say 10:00 the next morning. Until then only you can see them.
landing.faq3q: A guest shot with a filter. Can I get the original?
landing.faq3a: Yes. The original is always stored clean at full resolution; the style is only laid over it at display time.
landing.faq4a: Kormem is free — no subscriptions and no per-event fees.
landing.faq5a: In private storage. Access opens only through your event link and only after the reveal. Download the archive and they are yours forever.
landing.ctaTitle: Let the morning show your day

auth.title: Sign in to Kormem
auth.subtitle: The host dashboard: events, QR codes and galleries.
auth.linkSentHint: Open the email at {email} and follow the link on this device.
auth.noPassword: No passwords: a link to your email, or Google sign-in.

dashboard.title: Your events
dashboard.emptyText: Create your first event. The QR code and the guest camera will be ready in a minute.

create.title: New event
create.subtitle: A minute of setup and the camera is ready for your guests.
create.endAfterStart: End time must be after the start
create.shotsHint: The fewer the shots, the more each one matters.
create.guestsHint: The QR code stops accepting new guests past this number. Leave empty for unlimited.
create.revealInstantHint: Shots appear in the gallery right after capture
create.revealEventEndHint: The gallery opens when the event ends
create.styleHint: The starting style of the guest camera. Originals are always stored clean.

event.shareHint: Print QR cards for the tables or drop the link into the guest chat. They need no app and no account.
event.revealNowConfirm: Show the gallery to everyone right now?
event.hostOnlyNote: visible only to you until the reveal
event.noPhotosYet: No shots yet. As soon as guests start shooting, everything lands here.

guest.nameHint: Your name appears under your shots in the shared gallery
guest.noAppNeeded: No app, no sign-up. Your shots open in the shared gallery.

camera.outOfFilmText: All {shots} shots are taken. Great work, now we wait for the reveal.
camera.permissionText: Allow camera access in your browser settings, or shoot with your phone's native camera.
camera.micPermissionText: Allow microphone access in your browser settings to leave a voice wish.
camera.voicePrompt: Leave a voice wish for the hosts of “{event}”
camera.voiceHint: One voice wish per guest — make it count.
camera.voiceCapReached: Your voice wish is already on the roll.
camera.videoCapReached: All video clips used — photos still work!
camera.videoTooLarge: That clip is too long — keep it under 10 seconds.

gallery.lockedText: The gallery opens {time}. Nobody sees it earlier, not even us.
